hero.title: Spine Summer Camp
hero.subtitle: An unforgettable summer of learning, creativity, and fun for children ages 4–16.
hero.partnerText1: Brought to you by the educational experts at <spine>Spine Consultancy</spine> and hosted at the prestigious <ghion>Ghion Hotel</ghion>.
hero.partnerText2: We have carefully crafted a unique environment where your child can thrive, develop new skills, and create lifelong memories.

packages.title: Choose Your Package
packages.subtitle: Flexible options designed to fit your family's schedule and interests

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Spine Summer Camp

items.question: What age groups are accepted?
items.answer: Spine Summer Camp accepts children between the ages of 4 and 16. We group campers by age to ensure age-appropriate activities.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: Payment is accepted via CBE or Zemen Bank transfer. After registering, you will receive bank account details and must upload your receipt to confirm enrollment.

items.question: What should my child bring?
items.answer: Campers should bring a water bottle, a notebook, and any personal items they may need. A full list of required materials will be sent upon registration approval.

items.question: Can I register for both sessions?
items.answer: Each child may only register for one session. If you have multiple children, you may register each child separately for different sessions.

items.question: How long does it take to confirm my registration?
items.answer: After uploading your payment receipt, we review it within 24 hours and send a confirmation email to the parent's email address provided during registration.

activitiesPage.title: About Us
activitiesPage.subtitle: Discover everything you need to know about Spine Summer Camp.
activitiesPage.aboutText: Welcome to the ultimate summer experience! <spine>Spine Consultancy</spine> and <ghion>Ghion Hotel</ghion> have proudly partnered to bring you an unforgettable Summer Camp for your children. We believe in nurturing young minds through a perfect blend of learning, creativity, and fun. Our carefully designed programs offer a safe and engaging environment where children can build confidence, make new friends, and discover their hidden talents. Join us for a summer filled with joy and growth!

items.title: Swimming
items.description: Fun and safe swimming sessions to cool off and build confidence in the water.

items.title: Cultural Dance
items.description: Learn traditional dances and embrace our rich cultural heritage.

items.title: Empathy & Self-Awareness
items.description: Sessions designed to build emotional intelligence and self-confidence.

items.title: Football
items.description: Team building and physical fitness through our popular football games.

items.title: Creative & Fun Activities
items.description: Arts, crafts, and imaginative play to spark creativity.

items.title: Karate & Self-Defense
items.description: Learn basic self-defense skills while improving discipline and focus.

items.title: Smart Thinking Games
items.description: Chess and other puzzles that challenge the mind and develop strategic thinking.

items.title: Cycling
items.description: Cycling sessions to improve coordination, balance, and physical health.

items.title: Arts & Crafts
items.description: Hands-on paper crafts, origami, and creative projects that inspire imagination and fine motor skills.
